key_themes: 人形机器人商业化加速
光子链路瓶颈与价格飙升
超大规模数据中心资本开支长期增长
aleabitoreddit.recent_shift: 从关注存储和光子瓶颈转向人形机器人整机标的，强调Agility Robotics为美国首家纯人形机器人上市公司。
representative_quotes: Agility Robotics is literally the #1 humanoid player in the US in terms of commercialization today imo. ... at $16, you have a ~$4B MC pre-money humanoid player.
Hyperscalers bottlenecking upstream photonics confirmation validation… on all fronts from pricing, demand, to supply shortages.

Retail thinks a 30-60% drop is a “falling knife” where bagholders will never recover. … I see it as long term ownership over: - the next hyperscaler with $NBIS … - 40% of the InP supply chain with $AXTI …

key_themes: 地缘政治风险与能源波动
消费疲软与家庭财务恶化
央行增持黄金与美元下滑
政商交易关联与内幕担忧
unusual_whales.recent_shift: 近期倾向指出市场脆弱性、家庭财务恶化及潜在泡沫，与前期部分乐观论调形成对比。
representative_quotes: AI costs more than the people it replaced, per Forbes.
Household worries over finances hit highest level since July 2022, per the New York Fed survey
The S&P 500 was called “statistically expensive on 17 of 20 metrics,” and trades rich versus tech bubble metrics on eight of them.

key_themes: 存储芯片（HBM/DRAM）供需紧张，海力士与美光盈利爆发
AI基建仍处早期，玻璃基板与光互连将成下一代芯片底座
杠杆仓位管理的重要性，经历暴跌后回归正股为主
xiaomustock.recent_shift: 近期观点从聚焦存储与杠杆ETF转向重视玻璃基板（康宁）、封测（日月光）等产业链上游确定性机会
representative_quotes: 活过来了，终于反弹了，韩股总不可能天天熔断吧。AI总不可能不搞了吧。
要么早信要么坚决不信，先信卖后信
未来是属于AI的，但暴跌是因为市场在调节涨幅去匹配季度营收或预期营收
